post.caption:
💡 Pro tip for better AI conversations

Ask Claude to show its work! When you request step-by-step reasoning, you get more accurate responses AND insight into how AI problem-solves.

Try: "Walk me through your thinking on this"

#ClaudeAI #AITips #ProductivityHack

story_data.tip_text: Ask Claude to explain its reasoning process step-by-step
story_data.subtext: You'll get more accurate answers and learn how AI thinks through problems.
